Post       : What should I ask Dan Wang?
URL        : https://marginalrevolution.com/marginalrevolution/2025/10/what-should-i-ask-dan-wang.html
Posted     : October 26, 2025 at 5:35 pm
Author     : Tyler Cowen
Categories : Books, Economics, Law, Music, Political Science, Travel, Uncategorized

Yes, I will be doing a podcast with him.  Dan first became famous on the internet with his excellent Christmas letters ( https://www.google.com/search?q=dan+wang+christmas+letter&sca_esv=6e39c7eb808723cd&source=hp&ei=BpP-aKzxOaqe5NoPh9CA8Ak&iflsig=AOw8s4IAAAAAaP6hFlS6JjG2eRHGslvAjRQg-gNDKI49&ved=0ahUKEwisjNP358KQAxUqD1kFHQcoAJ4Q4dUDCBo&uact=5&oq=dan+wang+christmas+letter&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz ) .  More recently, Dan is the author of the NYT bestselling book Breakneck: China's Quest to Engineer the Future ( https://www.amazon.com/Breakneck-Chinas-Quest-Engineer-Future/dp/1324106034 ) .

Here is Dan Wang on Wikipedia ( https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dan_Wang ) , here is Dan on Twitter ( https://x.com/danwwang?ref_src=twsrc%5Egoogle%7Ctwcamp%5Eserp%7Ctwgr%5Eauthor ) .  I have known him for some while.  So what should I ask him?
